languages.text: "Аугментации, Ваша Светлость. В наших песнях говорится, что у вашего предка было столь много даров, что он мог делиться ими с другими. Не знаю, правда это или нет, но то, что Вольный Торговец обеспечил весь полк протезами — это точно. Мы продолжаем его дело по мере сил". {n}Ведка демонстративно сжимает металлическую руку с костяными когтями.{/n}

"Augmetics, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. In our songs, it is said your ancestor possessed so many gifts that he could share them with others. I don't know if this is true. But that the Rogue Trader supplied the entire regiment with prosthetics is certain. We continue his work as best we can." {n}Vedka demonstratively clenches her metal hand, which is tipped with claws of bone.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Аугментации, Ваша Светлость. В наших песнях говорится, что у вашего предка было столь много даров, что он мог делиться ими с другими. Не знаю, правда это или нет, но то, что Вольный Торговец обеспечил весь полк протезами — это точно. Мы продолжаем его дело по мере сил". {n}Ведка демонстративно сжимает металлическую руку с костяными когтями.{/n}

We continue his work as best we can." {n}Vedka demonstratively clenches her metal hand, tipped with claws of bone.{/n}

languages.text: “是植入物，大人。在我们的歌谣里，您的先祖拥有的馈赠如此之多，多到能分给别人。我不知道这是真是假。但行商浪人的的确确给整个军团都提供了义体。我们也在尽力延续他的事业。”{n}薇德卡示意性地攥紧了她那只金属手，其指尖镶着骨质的利爪。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Augmetics, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. In our songs, it is said your ancestor possessed so many gifts that he could share them with others. I don't know if this is true. But that the Rogue Trader supplied the entire regiment with prosthetics is certain. We continue his work as best we can." {n}Vedka demonstratively clenches her metal hand, which is tipped with claws of bone.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “是植入物，大人。在我们的歌谣里，您的先祖拥有的馈赠如此之多，多到能分给别人。我不知道这是真是假。但行商浪人的的确确给整个军团都提供了义体。我们也在尽力延续他的事业。”{n}薇德卡示意性地攥紧了她那只金属手，其指尖镶着骨质的利爪。{/n}

languages.text: "Ogmentikler {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Şarkılarımızda, atanızın başkalarıyla paylaşabileceği kadar çok hediyesi olduğu söylenir. Bunun doğru olup olmadığını bilmiyorum. Fakat Hür Tacir'in tüm alaya protez sağladığı kesin. O'nun işine elimizden geldiğince devam ediyoruz." {n}Vedka, gösterişli bir şekilde kemik pençelerle biten metal elini yumruk yapıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Augmetics, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. In our songs, it is said your ancestor possessed so many gifts that he could share them with others. I don't know if this is true. But that the Rogue Trader supplied the entire regiment with prosthetics is certain. We continue his work as best we can." {n}Vedka demonstratively clenches her metal hand, which is tipped with claws of bone.{/n}

Fakat Hür Tacir'in tüm alaya protez sağladığı kesin. O'nun işine elimizden geldiğince devam ediyoruz." {n}Vedka, gösterişli bir şekilde kemik pençelerle biten metal elini yumruk yapıyor.{/n}

languages.text: « Ses augmétiques, Votre Seigneurie. Nos chants racontent que votre ancêtre possédait tant de dons qu'il pouvait les partager avec autrui. J'ignore si c'est vrai, mais une chose est certaine : le libre-marchand a fourni des prothèses au régiment entier. Nous poursuivons son travail du mieux que nous le pouvons. » {n}Comme pour démontrer ses dires, Vedka serre sa main métallique aux griffes d'os.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Augmetics, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. In our songs, it is said your ancestor possessed so many gifts that he could share them with others. I don't know if this is true. But that the Rogue Trader supplied the entire regiment with prosthetics is certain. We continue his work as best we can." {n}Vedka demonstratively clenches her metal hand, which is tipped with claws of bone.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Ses augmétiques, Votre Seigneurie. Nos chants racontent que votre ancêtre possédait tant de dons qu'il pouvait les partager avec autrui. J'ignore si c'est vrai, mais une chose est certaine : le libre-marchand a fourni des prothèses au régiment entier. Nous poursuivons son travail du mieux que nous le pouvons. » {n}Comme pour démontrer ses dires, Vedka serre sa main métallique aux griffes d'os.{/n}

languages.text: «Auméticos, mi{mf|lord|lady}. En nuestras canciones, se dice que su antepasado tenía tantos dones como para compartirlos con los demás. No sé si eso es del todo verídico, pero sí es cierto que el Comerciante Independiente proporcionó prótesis para todo el regimiento. Seguimos su labor lo mejor que podemos». {n}A modo de demostración, Vedka cierra su mano metálica, rematada con garras de hueso.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Augmetics, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. In our songs, it is said your ancestor possessed so many gifts that he could share them with others. I don't know if this is true. But that the Rogue Trader supplied the entire regiment with prosthetics is certain. We continue his work as best we can." {n}Vedka demonstratively clenches her metal hand, which is tipped with claws of bone.{/n}

Seguimos su labor lo mejor que podemos». {n}A modo de demostración, Vedka cierra su mano metálica, rematada con garras de hueso.{/n}

languages.text: "Augmentationen, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. In unseren Liedern heißt es, Euer Ahnherr hatte so viele Gaben, dass er sie mit anderen teilen konnte. Ich weiß nicht, ob das stimmt. Aber dass der Freihändler das gesamte Regiment mit Prothesen versorgt hat, steht fest. Wir führen sein Werk nach Kräften fort." {n}Vedka ballt demonstrativ ihre metallene Hand mit den knöchernen Klauen.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Augmetics, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. In our songs, it is said your ancestor possessed so many gifts that he could share them with others. I don't know if this is true. But that the Rogue Trader supplied the entire regiment with prosthetics is certain. We continue his work as best we can." {n}Vedka demonstratively clenches her metal hand, which is tipped with claws of bone.{/n}

Ich weiß nicht, ob das stimmt. Aber dass der Freihändler das gesamte Regiment mit Prothesen versorgt hat, steht fest. Wir führen sein Werk nach Kräften fort." {n}Vedka ballt demonstrativ ihre metallene Hand mit den knöchernen Klauen.{/n}

languages.text: 「増幅器、貴方様。我々の歌では、貴方の祖先が多くの才能を持っていたと歌われています。その才能を他人に分け与えたというのです。それが本当かどうかはわかりませんが、少なくとも、このローグトレーダーが整列した兵士全員に義肢を供給したことは確かです。我々は、彼が残した仕事をできる限り引き継いでいます。」{n}ヴェドカは、骨の爪がついた金属製の腕を力強く握ります。{/n}
